[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 01001010 3
1 00010000 1
2 10100100 3
3 01000001 2
4 10010010 3
5 01010100 3
6 10100100 3
7 00100111 4
